'''鈭歮-w-dh-sh''' ('''kamawdheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bebloody|bebloody]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-w-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bebloody|bebloody]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-w-dh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kamawdheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimawdheshoko|thimawdheshoko]] || [[word:jimawdheshoko|jimawdheshoko]] || [[word:shimawdheshoko|shimawdheshoko]] || [[word:kimawdheshoko|kimawdheshoko]]
|-
